rights.useDescriptionsLiOne: We use these materials solely for the purpose of book identification.
rights.useDescriptionsLiTwo: <0>Book Catalog</0> does not claim authorship of images provided by publishers or partners.
rights.useDescriptionsLiThree: If you are a copyright holder and wish to modify or remove information about your publication, please contact our support team.
rights.generatedContexParagraph: By leaving reviews or ratings on the site, you grant <0>Book Catalog</0> the right to publish and distribute them within our platform. However, the authorship of the review remains with you.
rights.copyingParagraph: Any automated data collection (scraping) or full copying of our catalogs database without the explicit consent of <0>Book Catalog</0> is strictly prohibited and subject to legal action.
rights.update: Last updated: February 17, 2026. We reserve the right to modify these terms without prior notice.
